title: F5 Camera control - F5视角控制器

body:
The F5 View Management Module allows server administrators to precisely control players' viewing behavior. It supports features such as force locking the view, customizing punishments, adjusting view parameters, and numerous customizable settings that can
[中国用户可以去MC百科进行下载;https://www.mcmod.cn/class/23697.html]


































---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Fully customizable camera position](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fe98509d40c6293b1b2baecbc84b8a548dd2fbe.png)

/Summer XTJL F5 reload [target player]

Resets and refreshes view configuration. Resets temporary view settings for all players. Refreshes the player's view parameters.

/Summer XTJL F5 debug

Displays debug information.

/Summer XTJL F5 help

Displays this help information.
